description: CompositionNavy blue and grey checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tabs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, branding on the left pocket, stitch detailing and a curved hemlineFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe stitch detailing, mix of colours and clever cut of this checked shirt from basics add rugged styling, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
